entry.title: Desk Photo 2010: Work @ Symantec
entry.content: After the office consolidated into one floor (instead of two), this was my new cubicle.
entry.summary: After the office consolidated into one floor (instead of two), this was my new cubicle.

entry.title: Jetta SportWagen TDI
entry.content: Sometime in September 2009, I set my eyes on a Jetta SportWagen TDI as my next car (I was then driving a 2000 F-150). On April 30th 2010 I finally committed to the vehicle and put down a deposit. On June 30th, I received my new car, special ordered the way I wanted it.
entry.summary: Sometime in September 2009, I set my eyes on a Jetta SportWagen TDI as my next car (I was then driving a 2000 F-150). On April 30th 2010 I finally committed to the vehicle and put down a deposit. On June 30th, I received my new car, special ordered the way I wanted it.
